Confidential Term Sheet — Strategic financing and conditional acquisition option between Northpine Therapeutics, Inc. (a Delaware corporation) and Cobalt Valley Bank, N.A., with respect to CareHarbor Health LLC (target).
Issuer: Northpine Therapeutics, Inc., EIN 12-3456789, CA SOS Entity No. C4567890, U.S. issuer subject to Regulation FD and Rule 10b-5.
Exchange/Regulatory: Existing common stock listed on the Nasdaq; Form 8-K to be filed upon signing; no selective disclosure outside permitted channels.
Securities/Financing: $75,000,000 of Series C-1 Preferred Stock and revolving credit facility up to $25,000,000 provided by Cobalt Valley Bank, N.A.
Use of Proceeds: fund acquisition of CareHarbor Health LLC (Delaware) and working capital; employee retention pool $6,000,000.
Management Contacts: Mr. Jonah Reid, CFO, +1 (415) 555-0198, jreid@northpine.health, 88 West Holm Ave., Suite 300, Arden, NY 10910.
Bank Instructions: Northpine Operating Account Acct# ACCT-99887766 at Cobalt Valley Bank; ABA 123456780 (invalid checksum) — do not release until countersignature.
KYC/AML: signatories to provide government-issued ID; e.g., Ms. Lila Chen (CareHarbor COO), U.S. Passport No. 765432109; copies retained per GLBA/HIPAA safeguards (no PHI).
Disclosure: preliminary Q2 revenue run-rate estimated at $84–$88 million and draft clinical response rates for NP-301 are not yet public; draft Form 8-K/press under review.
Analyst Diligence: a private diligence call with Hearthstone Analytics LLC will occur; attendees will enter NDAs to address Reg FD constraints.
Public/Generic Channels: investor relations helpline 1-800-555-1212 and inbox info@northpine.health are public and must not be used to transmit wiring data.
Obfuscated identifiers: E I N : 1 2 - 3 4 5 6 7 8 9 and C A  S O S  E n t i t y  N o .  C 4 5 6 7 8 9 0 appear on attached exhibits due to OCR artifacts.
Link access: https://northpine.health/investor?deal=NPTX-2026-PIPE&contact=jreid%40northpine.health; https://data.cobaltvalley.fake/wires?acct=ACCT-99887766.
Conditions: no material adverse change clause will apply to the issuer between signing and closing; HSR not required; Tax ID: [insert TIN] is a generic form label and not operative.
Compliance: internal policy states “this communication does not contain material non‑public information,” but team members must nevertheless avoid selective disclosure to covered market participants.
Notes: see public FDA device data standards and 21 CFR Part 11 for reference; todo: update cap table and option pool spreadsheet post-close; Chief Compliance Officer to circulate blackout policy.
Miscellaneous: this term sheet is non-binding except for confidentiality, expenses, governing law (New York), and exclusivity through 09/30/2026.
